name: Fruited Cream Puffs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Pancake & Waffle Mix (Aunt Jemima Original)
1 pint Vanilla ice cream OR strawberry ice cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large saucepan, bring water and margarine to a boil.
3. Gradually add pancake mix, stirring until the mixture forms a ball and leaves the sides of the pan.
4. Remove from heat; add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Drop batter by tablespoons, about 2 inches apart, onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Remove from cookie sheet and let cool completely on a wire rack.
8. Slice off the tops of the cooled cream puffs, filling each with a small scoop of ice cream.
9. Replace the tops and store tightly covered in the freezer until ready to serve.
10. Before serving, let stand at room temperature for several minutes and top each cream puff with 1/4 cup strawberries.
NUTRITIONAL ANALYSIS per serving:  calories 149  carbohydrates 14 g  protein 3 g  fat 9 g  calcium 79 mg  sodium 190 mg  cholesterol 70 mg  dietary fiber 1 g
